title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About OLX India Asia Pacific Associates:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India Asia Pacific Associates!
